gridLayout.title: Grid Layout
gridLayout.help: Design a responsive grid layout for this page. Drag to move, resize from corners. Double-click labels to rename.
gridLayout.empty: No grid blocks yet. Click 'Add Block' to start designing the layout.

components.title: Choose Component
components.description: Select which component this grid block will display.
components.albumDesc: Main photo with 3 small thumbnails in the bottom-right corner.
components.albumGridDesc: Paginated grid of albums. Items count adapts to block size.
components.albumCarouselDesc: Paginated carousel of albums. Items count adapts to block size.
components.adDesc: Single listing card with image, price and description.
components.adGridDesc: Paginated grid of listings. Items count adapts to block size.
components.adCarouselDesc: Paginated carousel of listings. Items count adapts to block size.
components.blogDesc: Single blog post card with image, title and excerpt.
components.blogGridDesc: Paginated grid of blog posts. Items count adapts to block size.
components.blogCarouselDesc: Paginated carousel of blog posts. Items count adapts to block size.
components.chatRoomDesc: Single chat room card with name, member count and last message.
components.chatRoomGridDesc: Paginated grid of chat rooms. Items count adapts to block size.
components.chatRoomCarouselDesc: Paginated carousel of chat rooms. Items count adapts to block size.
components.userProfileDesc: Single user profile card with avatar, name and bio.
components.userProfileGridDesc: Paginated grid of user profiles. Items count adapts to block size.
components.userProfileCarouselDesc: Paginated carousel of user profiles. Items count adapts to block size.
components.reelDesc: Single vertical video reel with play overlay and engagement stats.
components.reelGridDesc: Paginated grid of video reels. Items count adapts to block size.
components.reelCarouselDesc: Paginated carousel of video reels. Items count adapts to block size.
components.storyDesc: Single story circle with user avatar and name.
components.storyGridDesc: Paginated grid of stories. Items count adapts to block size.
components.storyCarouselDesc: Paginated carousel of stories. Items count adapts to block size.
